cost_name: Civil & Construction — PEM Greenfield — 100 MW — Europe 2025

estimation.estimation_method: IRENA 2024 + chemical plant civil cost norms. PEM footprint ~50 m²/MW. Includes site preparation, electrolyzer hall building, control room, warehouse, foundations, pipe racks, roads, drainage, fencing.

confidence.rationale: Civil costs are well-established for industrial plants. Hydrogen-specific factors (ATEX zoning, blast protection) add ~10-15% vs standard industrial building.

primary_drivers: ATEX zoning and blast protection requirements
Local building codes and seismic zone
